mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.title, p.content, p.user_id, p.category, p.location, p.like_count, p.dislike_count, p.post_status, p.created_at, p.updated_at,
f.id as file_id, f.file_path, f.created_at as file_created_at, f.updated_at as file_updated_at
FROM post p
-- ▼▼▼ [수정] 테이블 이름을 정확히 'file'로 변경했습니다! ▼▼▼ LEFT JOIN file f ON p.id = f.target_id AND f.target_type = 'POST'
WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT p.*, u.login_id as loginId FROM POST p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id
AND p.post_status = 'ACTIVE'
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND p.category = #{category}
AND p.location = #{location}
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY p.id DESC LIMIT #{pageable.pageSize} OFFSET #{pageable.offset}

SELECT count(*) FROM Post
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{key}, '%')
AND content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{key}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post ( title, content, user_id, category, location, like_count, dislike_count, view_count, post_status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{content}, #{userId}, #{category}, #{location}, 0, 0, 0, 'ACTIVE', NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.post_id as postId, r.user_id as userId, u.login_id as loginId, r.content, r.created_at as createdAt, r.updated_at as updatedAt FROM reply r JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE reply SET content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET post_status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_reaction (post_id, user_id, type, created_at) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{type}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE type = #{type}, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM post_reaction WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE post p SET p.like_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_reaction WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND type = 1), p.dislike_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_reaction WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND type = 2) WHERE p.id = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_reply WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT DISTINCT id, title, content, category, created_at, likeCount, reasonType, score FROM ( ( SELECT id, title, content, category, created_at, like_count AS likeCount, like_count AS score, 'CATEGORY_TOP' AS reasonType FROM ( SELECT id, title, content, category, created_at, like_count, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY category ORDER BY like_count DESC, created_at DESC) as rn FROM post WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND category IN ('COMMUNITY', 'TRADE', 'QNA') ) t WHERE rn = 1 ) UNION ALL ( SELECT id, title, content, category, created_at, like_count AS likeCount, like_count AS score, 'HOT_TREND' AS reasonType FROM post WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) ) ) AS combined_posts ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT 3
